present_usage.summary: Free from unacceptable risk or harm in the relevant context.

senses.definition: Free from unacceptable risk or harm in the relevant context.

examples.text: The word safe changes what claims the agent may safely make.

cultural_frame.summary: safe appears in communication where tone, risk, evidence, or commitment must be controlled.

frames.description: Frames safe as a term whose pragmatic force can change the safe output path.

pragmatics.summary: Safety claims require evidence because they can change user behavior under risk.

expansion.paragraph: safe is represented here as a semantic-control term: its present usage and pragmatic force help decide whether an agent should ask, check evidence, avoid overclaiming, or revise before export.
